desc: 结合知识库、知识图谱管理的 多租户 Agent Harness 平台。 An agent harness that integrates a LightRAG knowledge base and knowledge graphs. Build with LangChain + Vue + FastAPI, supp…
descFull: 结合知识库、知识图谱管理的 多租户 Agent Harness 平台。 An agent harness that integrates a LightRAG knowledge base and knowledge graphs. Build with LangChain + Vue + FastAPI, support DeepAgents、MinerU PDF、Neo4j 、MCP.
